title: Vconic Priority & Content Update
summary: The meeting focused on Vconic website development, communication issues, and strategic priorities. Perry requested a visual draft for feedback. Michael committed to providing a staging version and preparing LinkedIn assets to align with Vinnie's launch priority.

decisions.description: Michael will provide a visual, password-protected website draft.
Michael will provide a staging version of the site today.
LinkedIn project will be put in a secondary stage.
Focus on basic presence for LinkedIn deliverables.
Michael will prepare LinkedIn assets like hero images and templates.

actionItems.task: Send link to staging website (homepage, product pages, etc.).

expectedOutcome.description: Perry can view and provide feedback.

actionItems.task: Publish draft website behind firewall or password protection.

expectedOutcome.description: Perry can view content and presentation context.

actionItems.task: Put LinkedIn project in a secondary stage.

expectedOutcome.description: Focus on hero images, banners, post templates.

actionItems.task: Provide feedback on the website draft.

expectedOutcome.description: Refine website for going live quickly.

actionItems.task: Stay in touch on Slack for updates.

tensions: Michael Donovan's frustration with Vinnie's conflicting directives.
Different approaches between Vinnie (sales) and Michael Donovan (structure).
Michael feeling 'rugpulled' on projects due to changing priorities.
referencesToPast: Recalled previous conversation about website draft commitment.
Mentioned Vinnie's directives to not worry about Viconic.
Vinnie's 'rant' about social posts stemmed from a P&L discussion.
Referred to a conversation a week ago to restart.

contributions.description: Requested visual draft for effective feedback.
Detailed existing framework, pages, components, and style guide.
Proposed two paths for website iteration.
Expressed desire for website to launch ASAP.
Explained focus on building infrastructure for future content.
